scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently -k -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server
scripts.test: npm run build -w shared && npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w shared && npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck -w server
